title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Message from Tom to Grace
questions.text: Grace, I found your science notebook under the desk after you left. I’ll give it to our teacher before registration tomorrow unless you need it tonight. Text me if you want to collect it from my house.
questions.question: Why is Tom texting Grace?

options.C: To explain how she can get something back.
options.A: To ask her to bring his notebook tomorrow.
options.B: To remind her to finish some science homework.

questions.explanation: Tom has found Grace’s notebook and offers ways to get it back.

questions.heading: Drama Club Auditions
questions.text: Auditions for the summer play are on Thursday after school in Room 8. You don’t need to prepare anything, but you must stay until 5 p.m. so everyone can read scenes with different students.
questions.question: What does the poster say about the auditions?

options.A: Students must be available for the whole session.
options.B: Students should learn a scene before they arrive.
options.C: Only students in Room 8 can try for the play.

questions.explanation: The poster says students must stay until 5 p.m.

questions.heading: City Museum Tickets
questions.text: Family tickets include two adults and up to three children under sixteen. Extra children’s tickets can be bought at half price. Tickets are valid all day, but visitors cannot leave the museum and return later.
questions.question: What should visitors understand?

options.B: A family ticket may not cover every child in a group.
options.A: Visitors can use the same ticket on another day.
options.C: Children under sixteen enter the museum free.

questions.explanation: The family ticket includes up to three children only.

questions.heading: From: Carla / Subject: Saturday practice
questions.text: Hi everyone, the sports hall is being cleaned on Saturday morning, so basketball practice will start outside on the playground. Bring a jacket as well as trainers. If it rains heavily, we’ll move into the small gym.
questions.question: What is Carla telling the team?

options.C: They should be ready to practise in a different place.
options.A: They cannot play basketball at school on Saturday.
options.B: They need special shoes for the small gym.

questions.explanation: Practice starts on the playground and may move to the gym.

questions.heading: Art Room
questions.text: Please wash all brushes and put them back in the pots before you leave. Paint left on tables or sinks makes extra work for the next class. Students who finish early should help tidy the shelves.
questions.question: What does the notice ask students to do?

options.A: Leave the art room ready for other students.
options.B: Put finished paintings on the shelves.
options.C: Ask the next class to clean the tables.

questions.explanation: Students must clean brushes and tidy the room.
